--- sample 1: Claude Code proceed prompt ---
█ claude-code v4.6
> analyze this codebase and give me a summary

Based on my analysis, here's the summary...

Do you want to proceed with the full analysis? [y/n]
--- sample 2: Claude proceed confirmation ---
Some output from previous command
More output lines here

Do you want to continue? [Y/n]
--- sample 3: proceed with uppercase ---
The tool execution requires confirmation.
Do you want to PROCEED? (yes/no)
